title: Aigostar 3 Tier Electric Food Steamer 12L, 900W Vegetable Steamer with 60 Minute Timer, BPA Free, Separate Rice Bowl and Stackable Steam Baskets, Healthy Cooking, Energy Saving, Refill While Steaming
features: HEALTHY COMES FIRST - Made of food-grade BPA free materials, the electric food steamer provide hassle-free healthy cooking, low-fat steam cooking helps to preserve the highest possible levels of vitamins and nutritional value, it can be a good help to baby or whole family

3 TIERS SIMULTANEOUS COOKING - Comes with three detachable steaming baskets, the vegetable steamer can hold up to 12L large capacity of food, which allows you to cook different types of food at the same time, suitable for personal to family, and grooves on the bottom specially for eggs, stackable design to save space

Fast Steam Production - With a powerful 900w and turbo steam ring design, the electric food steamer creates steam fast, ensuring that your food is cooked quickly and evenly. The 60-minute timer function allows you to set the cooking time according to your needs, giving you complete control over the cooking process

EASY TO REFILL - The water level indicator lets you know when it's time to add more water, ensuring that your food is cooked properly and doesn't dry out. Additionally, two side water inlets on the handle of the food steamer that allows you to add water without having to remove the baskets, making it easy to refill

EASY TO CLEAN - The drip tray design of the veg steamer ensures that any excess water or condensation is collected, making it easy to clean and maintain. The separate rice bowl allows you to cook rice separately from other foods, ensuring that it is cooked to perfection every time
